_comment: v11-beta calibration config tuned for v11 collector pairs. Use this when the paired dataset comes from data/calibration/v11/v11_station_weather_pairs.csv produced by v11_archive_collect_once.py. Feature group names reference Open-Meteo column names (temperature_2m etc.) which the patched baselines script also aliases to legacy NEA names (air_temperature_c etc.).

model._proxy_note: raw_proxy_wbgt_radiative_fallback_c is the collector's most complete fallback (Stull wet-bulb + radiation + wind correction). Treat M0/M1 results as testing the fallback formula's bias, NOT the project's v0.6 production WBGT proxy.

_notes: Feature names that don't exist in the paired dataset will be silently dropped by available_features(). This means M5/M6 morphology/overhead features only contribute for stations with cell_id mapped (currently only S128).

Inertia features include shortwave_3h_mean and wetbulb_stull_c as proxies for thermal lag. True lag features (lag1, roll3_mean, day_cumsum, dtemp_dt) are NOT computed by the collector and would need a separate prep step.
Treat all M0-M6 metrics on <14 days of archive as PIPELINE INTEGRATION TEST results, not calibration evidence.
Threshold scan WBGT>=33: only ~29 events, dominated by S142 (~19 events). Report as exploratory only.
